---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, command, rule, or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What gap or pain are you trying to close? What can't you do today?

## Proposed change

What you'd like PHARN to do.

## Type of addition

- [ ] Capability (skill / lens / validator / verifier / griller / auditor)
- [ ] Command
- [ ] Rule
- [ ] Floor / hook change (the deterministic layer)
- [ ] Docs / other

## Checks

- [ ] I searched for an existing capability or rule that overlaps.
- [ ] This is triggered by a **real** failure (a dogfood or eval failure), not a hypothetical (P7).
- [ ] This does **not** rely on LLM classification where a deterministic membership test would do (P5).
- [ ] This does **not** violate a constitutional principle (P0–P7).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why this one wins.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues.
